title: Call for Independent Research
summary: Drop #15 encouraged readers to independently investigate claims rather than trust institutional sources. This participatory style became central to QAnon culture.
raw_text:
Do not trust anyone.
Research for yourself.
Use logic.
Follow the data.
Q

lines.fact: The statement encourages independent investigation but does not specify standards for evaluating evidence.
lines.theory: Q followers viewed collaborative online investigation as a form of decentralized intelligence gathering.
lines.context: Crowdsourced research became a defining feature of Q communities across message boards and social platforms.
lines.questions: What standards of evidence are necessary to prevent confirmation bias in collaborative investigations?
lines.Deltas: 2018-2025: Online communities continued developing collaborative open-source investigation models across political movements.
